title: stachys hians
intro: Stachys hians, also known as the 'Alpine Betony', is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stachys hians include relief from digestive issues, colds, and fever, as well as its ability to soothe nervous disorders and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Stachys hians include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
